title: zeliauros repens
intro: Zeliauros repens, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Zeliauros repens include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
